metadata.title: ns-dsl: raw and aggregated evaluation outputs for a neutrosophic decision layer in microservices (data)

creators.name: El-Ghareeb, Haitham A.
creators.affiliation: Information Systems Department, Faculty of Computers and Information Sciences, Mansoura University, Mansoura, Egypt

metadata.description: Complete evaluation outputs for the article 'A decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices architectures': the raw per-trial CSVs for all five master seeds, the canonical aggregated result summaries that underlie every figure and table, the generated figures, and the content-hashed calibration file. All outputs are produced by the simulator under a fixed calibration (SHA-256 16dc5ef33908a3723eb896b1bba1129ed147643f8a3bef4a55c459f9ec836070, recorded in every CSV header) and the recorded random seeds described in the Methods. RESTRICTED during peer review; reviewers obtain access via a private link; released openly upon publication.
metadata.access_conditions: Held under restricted access during peer review. Editors and reviewers of Scientific Reports are granted access via the private link provided to the editorial office. The record will be made openly available under CC BY 4.0 upon publication of the article.
metadata.notes: Companion software archived separately as DOI 10.5281/zenodo.YYYYYYY. Replace placeholder DOIs with the reserved Zenodo DOIs before final submission.
